domain_entity.brief: A versioned wrapper+engine bundle for a compute grid application.
domain_entity.description:
Combines a specific wrapper version with a specific engine version for a given
platform. The BOINC equivalent of 'app_version'. Nodes download the package_uri
bundle and launch the wrapper to run the engine.

primary_key.description: UUID primary key for the app version.

columns.name: wrapper_version
columns.description: Version of the OreStudio wrapper binary, e.g. 'v1.2.0'.

columns.name: engine_version
columns.description: Version of the underlying engine, e.g. 'ORE-Studio-7.1'.

columns.name: package_uri
columns.description: URI pointing to the zipped wrapper+engine bundle in object storage.

columns.name: min_ram_mb
columns.description: Minimum RAM in MB required by the node to run this app version.
